questionHtml: Find the probability that a suitcase weighs less than 15 kg.
markschemeHtml:
(M1)

Note: Award (M1) for sketch with 15 labelled and left tail shaded OR for a correct probability statement, P(X < 15).

0.0766  (0.0765637…, 7.66%)      (A1)   (C2)

[2 marks]

meta.title: Find the probability that a suitcase weighs less than 15 kg.
